case_title: HSIU FONG PAN VS. TNRC,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA COURTYARD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAN, HSIU FONG AS TO DEFENDANT TNRC,INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA COURTYARD CAFFE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
